text:
Market today: Tech sentiment is shaky, driven by volatility signals. Your concentrated tech/chip book, especially on margin, amplifies these moves.

Your holdings: SOXL is flagged for attention (down -24.38%). SPAL is also a concern (down -20.66%) and needs careful watching given its leveraged nature and your margin.

Watch: Keep an eye on the VIX/Nasdaq volatility divergence. It's a sign the smart money is getting nervous.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions and watch for volatility cues.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming exposure if it breaks below its current price.
SPAL: Watch the stop level closely; consider reducing if it continues to decline.
No new buys today - hold and watch
